# NetEngineerLab
Professional online tools for telecom and network engineers.

## Available tools
- Fiber Loss Calculator
- Optical Power Budget Calculator
- PON Splitter Loss Calculator
- ONU RX Power Diagnosis
- PON Maximum Distance Calculator
- OTDR Event Analyzer
- MTU & MSS Calculator
- IP Subnet Calculator
- Bandwidth & Transfer Time Calculator
- -48V Telecom Battery Runtime Calculator
- IPv6 & NAT Planning Calculator
- Wi-Fi Coverage & Capacity Planner

Tool outputs are engineering references and do not replace equipment specifications or field measurements.
